g.title: Starting new work?->Code done, need to commit?

Code done, need to commit?->Phase 2+3: Implement, Test, Commit & PR
Committed, need PR?->Phase 2+3: Implement, Test, Commit & PR
Create feature branch->Verify task in code
Mark done, move on->Ask: work on next task?
UI change?->Ask user to review changes
Run npm run test:visual->Baselines need update?
Baselines need update?->Show playwright report URL
Baselines need update?->Ask user to review changes

STOP: wait for user review response->Commit (clean message, no attribution)
Commit (clean message, no attribution)->Mark [x] in TODO.md immediately

Ask: Create PR?->STOP: wait for PR decision
STOP: wait for PR decision->Push + gh pr create

STOP: wait for merge confirmation->4 cleanup commands (sequential)
4 cleanup commands (sequential)->Remove task from TODO.md immediately
Remove task from TODO.md immediately->Ask: work on next task?
